The company utilizes certain of its financing receivables as collateral for nonrecourse borrowings. Financing receivables pledged as collateral for borrowings were $1,062 million and $710 million at December 31, 2019 and 2018, respectively. These borrowings are included in note P, “Borrowings.”
The company did not have any financing receivables held for sale as of December 31, 2019 and 2018.

Financing Receivables by Portfolio Segment The following tables present the recorded investment by portfolio segment and by class, excluding commercial financing receivables and other miscellaneous financing receivables at December 31, 2019 and 2018. Commercial financing receivables are excluded from the presentation of financing receivables by portfolio segment, as they are short term in nature and the current estimated risk of loss and resulting impact to the company’s financing results are not material.
